name: Orange Cake with Hot Rum Sauce
recipeIngredient: Pecans - 1 cup (finely chopped, powdered sugar for coating)
recipeInstructions:
Cake
1. Cream butter in a large bowl until fluffy.
2. Gradually add sugar and beat until light.
3. Stir in orange rind, then add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
4. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
5. Alternately add buttermilk with dry ingredients, beginning and ending with the dry mixture; beat well after each addition.
6. Fold in pecans and pour batter into a greased and floured 9-inch tube pan.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 50-60 minutes until a toothpick inserted comes out clean. Cool on a rack for 10 minutes.
Hot Rum Sauce
1. In a small saucepan, combine sugar, water, orange juice, lemon juice, and rum. Cook over medium heat for 1 minute.
2. Let the mixture cool slightly, then stir in the remaining ingredients.
3. Carefully spoon the sauce over warm cake until all is absorbed.
4. Dust with powdered sugar before serving. Store loosely covered.
